race.comment: HARSH (8) found more like his finding one horse better at Balaklava as a $2.6F. She was stepping up from 1600m and will have taken further improvement. Still shy of her Victorian best and Toeroek steers from an inside barrier. Can make amends. PETA'S HEART (4) is third-up and has been racing in stronger company at Morphettville. Her middle-distance form more than stacks up and she can fight out the finish with the extra fitness. MIKKI TANGO (3) led them up and capped threatening form with a win in a CL1 this track/trip. Came back to 1600m on a soft track at Murray Bridge, following but gave away a big start and was never in the picture. This suits him much better and count on Pannell to give him a good ride from the awkward barrier. Value hope. BUSH INFERENCE (7) won a 60 over 2000m at Naracoorte and couldn't have been more impressive, settling last and then racing wide. Gets in well with the 2kg claim. Has a decent record this track/distance and is included.
